description: AgainstTheWest (ATW) is a hacktivist group active since October 2021 that targets governments and corporations perceived as authoritarian, breaching organizations like Alibaba, Sberbank, and Gazprom using custom ransomware and wiper malware for ideological disruption rather than financial profit.

locations.title: Threat Actors | Onion Forums  - Internal Error

name: againstthewest
